notes: Refreshed for v1.12 (spec 44 Step 4d headless-mode fixes for gemini/copilot/codex). The pinned snyk-agent-scan==0.5.1 now reports W007+W011 for this skill (stable across 4 local runs and the CI run on this PR); it previously reported W011+W012. The package version pins the client, not the scanner's server-side backend model, so which presence-based heuristic it emits drifts between runs — W012 (external-CLI handoff) is no longer surfaced and W007 (insecure credential handling — the review templates quote a phrase anchor from the diff, and the self/claude path can return unredacted diff content) now is. Neither finding is introduced by the v1.12 change; both fire on features the skill needs. W011 is heuristic on `gh pr view`/`gh pr diff` ingestion. Mitigations (untrusted-content boundary markers, stdin transport for gemini/codex, the Step 4b pre-flight secret scan that redacts before any external-CLI handoff, argument validation) are documented in skills/peer-review/SKILL.md `## Security model`. The v1.12 change moved copilot's prompt from stdin to `-p` on argv, documented there as a residual risk backstopped by the secret scan; gemini and codex retain stdin transport.
